mapper.select: SELECT comp_id, orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, remark, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY use_yn desc, ord_seq
SELECT orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, remark FROM dataset.tb_dataset_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{orgnRoleId} IS NULL or #{orgnRoleId} = '' THEN TO_CHAR(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(orgn_role_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text , 4, '0') ELSE #{orgnRoleId} END FROM esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role WHERE orgn_role_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId} LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart_orgn_role( comp_id, orgn_role_id, orgn_role_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by )VALUES( #{compId}, #{orgnRoleId}, #{orgnRoleNm}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart toc WHERE toc.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY use_yn desc, created_at desc
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(chart_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as chart_id from esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart where chart_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart ( comp_id, chart_id, chart_nm, chart_data, org_count, use_yn, created_at, created_by, chart_blob_data ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{chartId}, #{chartNm}, #{chartData}, #{orgCount}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{chartBlobData} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart SET comp_id = #{compId}, chart_nm = #{chartNm}, chart_data = #{chartData}, org_count = #{orgCount}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, chart_blob_data = #{chartBlobData} WHERE chart_id = #{chartId}
mapper.select: select distinct(a.orgn_id) from esg.tb_orgn_info a left join esg.tb_hr_info b on a.orgn_id = b.orgn_id where a.comp_id = #{compId} and b.hr_id in (select unnest(string_to_array(#{id}, ',')))
